creator: fbsd@ettinsmoor.net
text: I was just bitten by this.  gnome-shell-extensions-3.18.4 has a hidden dependency on gnome-menus-3.13.3_1 through at least one shell extension.  The one that triggered a missing TypeLib stacktrace for me was "Auto move windows".  Pressing the gear button tries to load a menu which fails.  Installing gnome-menus makes the error go away.
